title: Extreme heat wave threatens U.S. power grids and July 4 travel
summary: The heat wave threatens to overwhelm U.S. grids and may force some to change their plans on one of the busiest travel weeks of the year.

title: Outside Taylor Swift’s Rehearsal Dinner, a Surprising Calm — and Security Worthy of Gaddafi
summary: It's the wedding of the century between Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce, but also vibes of a coup at the UN General Assembly.

title: The Do’s and Don’ts for Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce to Pull Off a Perfect Secret Celebrity Wedding
summary: Three decades after masterminding John Kennedy Jr. and Carolyn Bessette's under-the-radar nuptials, Rosemarie Terenzio has a playbook — and some pointed advice — for Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce.
